share_basis_note: Post-split (10:1, 2024-06) basis. 24,391M diluted shares (Q1 FY27 weighted) x $210.69 (2026-06-18 close, last <= as_of) = ~$5.139T. Price from Yahoo chart API [S006], independently re-fetched and cross-checked vs stockanalysis + websearch (all $210.69) per freshness.json. CORRECTS the 2026-06-19 run, which used $145.48 (~the 52-week low $142.03) as the current price -> see ../2026-06-19/ (preserved error sample) and backtests/framework_validation/INCIDENTS.md INC-001.

module_signals.finding: Anchor quarter (Q1 FY27, ended 2026-04-26) and FY26 baseline fully primary-sourced (8-K PR + CFO commentary + 10-K): revenue $81.6B, DC $75.2B (+92% Y/Y), GM 74.9%, FCF $48.6B, Q2 guide $91B. Independently re-verified 2026-06-20 (CNBC/TIKR/S&P match). Price now locked from a dated daily series AND cross-checked against >=2 independent sources (freshness.json) per lean-6module-v1.1. Gaps (custom-silicon quantitative share, 10-K line items, proxy) are haircuts, not vetoes.

Full-stack accelerated compute (GPU + CUDA + NVLink/InfiniBand/Spectrum-X networking + systems) is the bottleneck the AI industry must route through. Demand is a multi-quarter, primary-sourced forced market update, not a story: DC $75.2B (+92% Y/Y), networking $14.8B (+199%), Q2 guide $91B, customer base broadening to AI clouds/sovereign/enterprise. exceptional_bottleneck. Open: how much is durable vs pull-forward.

Captures the largest single AI-compute profit pool via CUDA lock-in + full-stack systems + networking (+199% Y/Y). Operator grade 4/5: 30y founder Jensen Huang, one-share-one-vote governance, capex-light. $80B new buyback authorization + dividend $0.01->$0.25 (2026-05-18) = real capital return -- but NOTE this is NOT a 'low-price buyback': at $210.69 the stock is only -11% off its ATH and +48% off its low, so repurchases are near highs, not cheap (the prior run mis-stated this off the stale price). Durability HIGH on training, MEDIUM on inference (custom-silicon battleground). Cyclical -> size capped below Confirmed.

Owner earnings unusually clean: capex-light (FY26 capex $6.1B), FCF=OE run-rate ~$182B, no capex black hole (opposite of the hyperscalers). Net cash ~$72B (fortress). GAAP net income inflated by ~$30.2B marketable-equity-security gains -> use operating owner earnings (non-GAAP basis) for valuation. The owner-earnings bridge CLOSES; valuation uncertainty is not in the bridge, it is in run-rate durability AND the entry price.

No structural breakage at as-of: thesis durability intact (bottleneck real, share not collapsed, +92%/+199%), balance sheet survives the bear (net cash $72B). pull-forward + custom-silicon = SIZE control + kill monitors, not a hard veto (SNDK lesson: do not over-veto a genuine cleanly-financed bottleneck). China REVISED vs the prior run: not a permanent loss -- USG reinstated a limited H200 export license to China (2026-02) and NVDA received orders (Huang, GTC 2026-03), restarting manufacturing; the Q2 guide still conservatively EXCLUDES China DC compute, so China is recoverable optionality the guide does not count, NOT 'permanent loss / expanding controls' as 2026-06-19 framed it.

At $210.69 ($5.139T), forward P/E ~28x, starting OE yield ~3.5%, base 5y IRR +4.8% < 8% hurdle -> PRICE IS THE BINDING CONSTRAINT (no margin of safety), the inverse of the prior run's '145 = friendly' conclusion (which was built on the 52-week LOW mistaken for the current price). Stock is -11% off ATH ($236.54), +48% off its low ($142.03) -- NOT near lows, NOT bearish sentiment. Asymmetry no longer favors a starter here: bull +18.6% / base +4.8% / bear -17.6%. 8%-hurdle-neutral entry ~$181; the exceptional business does not earn new money above it. Mirror of GOOGL/AAPL: great-to-exceptional business, no MOS at the current price.

starter_zone: No new money at $210.69. A structured STARTER (~3-5%) opens on a pullback into ~$155-181, where base 5y IRR climbs back above the 8% hurdle on an unchanged thesis.
add_zone: Scale toward 8-12% only into ~$142-155 (toward the 52-week low, base IRR ~12-14%) AND/OR on confirmation (Q2/Q3 FY27 revenue meeting the $91B guide + DC margin/share holding). Cyclicality caps the ceiling below Core.
trim_or_no_chase_zone: Current $210.69 is ALREADY above the ~$181 no-margin-of-safety line -> no chase; hard no-chase toward the $236.54 ATH. Existing holders HOLD an exceptional compounder; do not add new money here, do not trim (business unimpaired, no kill criterion fired).
binding_constraint: PRICE. At $210.69 the base 5y IRR (+4.8%) is below the 8% hurdle and the stock is only -11% off its ATH -> no margin of safety. The exceptional bottleneck business is intact and the owner-earnings bridge is clean, but valuation is now the binding go/no-go (mis-read as 'friendly' in the prior run off a stale price). Demand-durability vs pull-forward + DC share vs custom silicon remain SIZE + kill monitors, secondary to price. Completeness ~65% independently caps the ceiling at STARTER.
kill_criteria: Revenue materially misses the $91B Q2 guide, OR DC revenue prints sequential declines, OR gross margin breaks below ~65%.
Credible evidence of large-scale CSP/custom-silicon design wins structurally eroding DC share (the ONLY escalate-to-veto path).
Large inventory / purchase-commitment write-down (FY26 had a $4.5B H20 precedent).
Price stays above ~$181 with no offsetting estimate raise -> remains WATCH / no-chase (already the case at $210.69).
Huang key-man / succession shock -> lower durability ceiling.
runner_dissent: The bull instinct says: this is an exceptional, cleanly-financed bottleneck (FCF=OE ~$182B, net cash $72B, +92% DC) and the bull 5y IRR is +18.6% -- why not a small starter? The framework overrides to WATCH because, this time, PRICE IS the constraint: base 5y IRR +4.8% sits below the 8% hurdle, the stock is -11% off its ATH (not near lows), and a single $91B guide cannot underwrite paying up for a possibly cycle-peak run-rate. This is the EXACT inverse of the prior 2026-06-19 dissent, which argued 'price is not the constraint, $145 is near the 52-week low' -- that reasoning was fatally built on mistaking the 52-week LOW ($142.03) for the current price. Corrected: at the true $210.69 there is no margin of safety; WATCH until a pullback toward ~$155-181 (STARTER) or ~$142-155 (add). Business quality is not in doubt; the entry price is. Lower-confidence items left OPEN: custom-silicon quantitative share (O4), 10-K line items (O1), proxy (O3), China H200 ramp magnitude (O5).
